name: import-downloads
title: Import Downloads
description: Move recent downloads into a Finder folder. Includes a quick batch importer, a checkbox-based picker, and an Open Latest Download companion.
author: Fredrik-psd

commands.name: import
commands.title: Import Downloads
commands.description: Move the latest downloaded batch into the selected Finder folder

commands.name: pick-downloads
commands.title: Pick Downloads to Import
commands.description: Choose which recent downloads to import into the selected Finder folder

commands.name: open-latest-download
commands.title: Open Latest Download
commands.description: Reveal the most recently downloaded file in Finder

commands.name: undo-import
commands.title: Undo Last Import
commands.description: Move the most recently imported files back to where they came from

preferences.name: downloadsFolder
preferences.title: Downloads Folder
preferences.description: Folder to import files from. Defaults to ~/Downloads.

preferences.name: batchGapSeconds
preferences.title: Batch Gap (seconds)
preferences.description: Files downloaded within this many seconds of the most recent are part of the batch.

preferences.name: conflictPolicy
preferences.title: On Filename Conflict
preferences.description: What to do when a file with the same name already exists in the destination.

preferences.name: dateSubfolder
preferences.title: Date Subfolder
preferences.label: Move into a YYYY-MM-DD subfolder inside the destination
preferences.description: If on, the import creates a dated subfolder in the destination and moves files there.

preferences.name: finderTag
preferences.title: Finder Tag
preferences.description: Optional Finder tag colour or name to apply to imported files (e.g. "Blue", "Receipt"). Leave empty to skip.
